productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Gun Metal Grey Heels
description: Get dressed in these metallic heels from catwalk for a glam look. The metallic elasticated straps lend a dose of edginess to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Metallic shade straps on the forefoot, midfoot and behind ankle for durability and protection Elasticated bands on the forefoot and criss-crossed around the ankle for a snug Fit Midsole Synthetic woven fabric covered footbed with metallic shade panel detailing for durability and style Outsole Wedge heels for better support TPU outsole with grid pattern on the forefoot and heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
